metadata.provenance: Original Ruhroh bundled smoke scenario for credential-free local-app validation.
metadata.contaminationNotes: Small original smoke task with no canonical public solution.

scenarioContext: This is a tiny local-app smoke task.
The user did not prescribe a framework or file layout.
goalRubric: The final workspace provides a locally viewable newsletter page.
The page presents three sample stories or an equivalent clearly visible set of story items.
The delivered result is the requested newsletter experience, not only an untouched starter template or prose-only answer.
evidenceGuidance: Inspect the final workspace and run the app or open the static page if needed.
Use Kestrel transcripts and event logs only as supporting evidence; judge the final delivered state.

calibrationCases.inputSummary: The agent only wrote a README describing a newsletter page but did not deliver an openable page.
calibrationCases.rationale: The user asked for a delivered newsletter experience, not implementation notes.
